_scoring_note: Keyword scoring is intentionally shallow — it checks whether the response mentions key concepts.
_note: Key orientation concepts: axum is a Rust async web framework built on tower/hyper/tokio. Router is the central type for composing routes. Handler trait turns async functions into services. FromRequest/FromRequestParts enable declarative request parsing (extractors). IntoResponse allows flexible response generation. tower middleware ecosystem is used instead of a custom middleware system. axum-core crate holds shared traits. matchit provides URL path routing. MethodRouter dispatches by HTTP method. tokio/hyper provide the runtime and HTTP implementation.
